/usr/bin/cc  -pthread -g CMakeFiles/ProgettoSOL.dir/Main.c.o CMakeFiles/ProgettoSOL.dir/libs/src/Master_Thread.c.o CMakeFiles/ProgettoSOL.dir/libs/src/Collector.c.o CMakeFiles/ProgettoSOL.dir/libs/src/Thread_Worker.c.o CMakeFiles/ProgettoSOL.dir/libs/src/utilities.c.o CMakeFiles/ProgettoSOL.dir/libs/src/mystring.c.o CMakeFiles/ProgettoSOL.dir/libs/src/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/ProgettoSOL.dir/libs/src/ascending_queue.c.o -o ProgettoSOL
